text: I find myself in a space that exudes modernity and intention—surfaces of glass, sharp lights, and clean lines create an almost clinical order. Stepping further, I encounter vibrant walls alive with ideas, inviting curious minds to learn, reflect, and collaborate. Here, surrounded by expressions of research and creativity, I feel a blend of curiosity and humility. There is something energizing about being part of an environment dedicated to discovery, where thought and innovation seem to pulse openly in the air. I am aware of my smallness in the face of collective human striving, yet comforted by the possibility of connection and understanding.
